requirement_topic.en: Local Importer or Authorised Agent Requirement
requirement_topic.zh: 本地进口商或授权代理要求
requirement_topic.zht: 本地進口商或授權代理要求

summary.en: Importation of wireless and telecom terminal equipment into Kiribati requires a local importer or authorised agent registered in Kiribati. The importer is responsible for ensuring the equipment has obtained MICT type approval prior to importation, for customs clearance, and for ongoing compliance. China established diplomatic relations with Kiribati in September 2019 (Kiribati switched recognition from Taiwan to the People's Republic of China), and Chinese-Kiribati trade relations have been developing since. English-language labelling and documentation are sufficient; no additional language requirements apply. Given the very small market (~120,000 population), the importer network is limited and direct relationships with MICT are common.
summary.zh: 将无线及电信终端设备进口至基里巴斯，须在基里巴斯注册的本地进口商或授权代理。进口商负责确保设备在进口前已取得MICT型号认证、完成清关及持续合规。中国于2019年9月与基里巴斯建立外交关系（基里巴斯将承认由台湾转向中华人民共和国），中基贸易关系此后持续发展。英语标签和文件即可，无额外语言要求。鉴于市场规模极小（约12万人口），进口商网络有限，与MICT的直接关系较为普遍。
summary.zht: 將無線及電信終端設備進口至吉里巴斯，須在吉里巴斯注冊的本地進口商或授權代理。進口商負責確保設備在進口前已取得MICT型號認證、完成清關及持續合規。中國於2019年9月與吉里巴斯建立外交關係（吉里巴斯將承認由台灣轉向中華人民共和國），中吉貿易關係此後持續發展。英語標籤和文件即可，無額外語言要求。鑑於市場規模極小（約12萬人口），進口商網絡有限，與MICT的直接關係較為普遍。

standards_or_laws: Kiribati Telecommunications Act — importer and dealer obligations
MICT type approval application procedures (local representative requirement)

summary.en: In China, foreign products sold domestically require a China-registered importer or responsible entity listed on the product label. MIIT NAL applications must be filed by a China-registered entity. There is no equivalent outbound importer registration requirement imposed by China on exports to Kiribati.
summary.zh: 在中国，境外产品在国内销售须有在华注册的进口商或在产品标签上列明的责任实体。工信部NAL申请须由在华注册实体提交。中国对出口至基里巴斯的产品没有等效的出境进口商注册要求。
summary.zht: 在中國，境外產品在國內銷售須有在華注冊的進口商或在產品標籤上列明的責任實體。工信部NAL申請須由在華注冊實體提交。中國對出口至吉里巴斯的產品沒有等效的出境進口商注冊要求。

standards_or_laws: MIIT NAL applicant registration (China-registered entity required)
General Administration of Customs China (GACC) export procedures

gap.en: Chinese exporters must appoint a Kiribati-based local importer or authorised agent. The local entity is responsible for MICT type approval liaison, customs clearance, and in-market compliance. Given the bilateral diplomatic relationship established in 2019 and China's Pacific engagement, Chinese exporters may engage existing Pacific trading networks or Kiribati-based distributors. No formal registry of MICT-approved importers is publicly available; direct contact with MICT is recommended to identify approved channels.
gap.zh: 中国出口商须在基里巴斯指定本地进口商或授权代理。本地实体负责MICT型号认证联络、清关及市场内合规。鉴于2019年建立的双边外交关系及中国在太平洋地区的参与，中国出口商可借助现有太平洋贸易网络或基里巴斯本地经销商。目前无MICT批准进口商的公开注册名册，建议直接联系MICT确认批准渠道。
gap.zht: 中國出口商須在吉里巴斯指定本地進口商或授權代理。本地實體負責MICT型號認證聯絡、清關及市場內合規。鑑於2019年建立的雙邊外交關係及中國在太平洋地區的參與，中國出口商可借助現有太平洋貿易網絡或吉里巴斯本地經銷商。目前無MICT批准進口商的公開注冊名冊，建議直接聯繫MICT確認批准渠道。

source.publisher: Ministry of Information, Communication and Transport, Kiribati

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Kiribati-registered local importer or authorised agent is required. The local entity must liaise with MICT for type approval and handle customs clearance. Chinese exporters should identify a suitable Kiribati-based partner before shipment. Contact MICT directly to confirm importer registration requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 须指定在基里巴斯注册的本地进口商或授权代理。本地实体须与MICT联络处理型号认证并负责清关。中国出口商应在出货前确定合适的基里巴斯本地合作方。请直接联系MICT确认进口商注册要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 須指定在吉里巴斯注冊的本地進口商或授權代理。本地實體須與MICT聯絡處理型號認證並負責清關。中國出口商應在出貨前確定合適的吉里巴斯本地合作方。請直接聯繫MICT確認進口商注冊要求。
